criteriaCoverage.criterion: Inserting an If/branch yields a converging diamond: both arms lead to the SAME continuation node, trunk continues below, arms fan sideways, connectors converge into the single join with no diagonal/upward edges. Verified in a REAL browser (Playwright tokenizes connector paths + asserts convergence).
criteriaCoverage.evidence: mutate.ts insertOnEdge condition branch now sets onTrue=onFalse=edge.to (no fresh exit minted); B becomes the join structurally (no stored 'join' flag). layout.ts computeEdges adds an ARM_LANE source-x offset so two same-source/same-target arms get distinct connectors+`+` anchors but still END at the identical join top-center; the down-only assertion (toPoint.y>fromPoint.y) is preserved. e2e test 'insert an If -> a CONVERGING diamond' (line 202) PASSED in Chromium: asserts node-exit count==1, every path axis-aligned (pathIsAxisAligned), >=2 paths end at the SAME rounded (x,y) (pathEndPoint+key), and end-y > start-y (down-only). Seeded 'renders a seeded definition' regression also asserts convergence on the diamond seed. mutate.test.ts(16), layout.test.ts(13), orthogonal-path.test.ts(8), model.test.ts(19) all green cold.

criteriaCoverage.criterion: Each arm has its own +; adding a node to ONE arm while the other stays empty keeps the diamond and both rejoin; an Exit on an arm terminates only that arm. Round-trips through the DSL.
criteriaCoverage.evidence: Per-arm + comes free from CampaignCanvas rendering one campaign-edge-insert per outgoing edge (canvas unchanged). insertExitOnArm + reachableWithoutEdge added: an exit on a converging arm is allowed (join reachable via the other arm) and still REFUSED on a non-converging single-out edge (would orphan B). e2e tests PASSED in Chromium: 'per-arm + with an empty passthrough' (line 239 — send on one arm, other empty, still 1 exit, >=2 connectors converge), 'an Exit on an arm terminates only that arm' (line 275 — exit count becomes 2), 'round-trip: populated-arm diamond reopens with same node set + convergence' (line 315 — save+reopen via GET /campaigns/:id, node-condition+node-send present, convergence re-asserted). model.test.ts round-trip asserts buildDefinition(parseDefinition(diamond)) deep-equals + both onTrue/onFalse preserved. armInsertIndices selects arm + controls by vertical position below the condition card; e2e asserts exactly 3 inserts (trunk + 2 arms).

criteriaCoverage.criterion: Delete re-links to a valid converging graph; no loops/orphans; validateCampaignDefinition passes for the diamond; workspace-scoped. No regression in phase-5/6 canvas + editor e2e.
criteriaCoverage.evidence: deleteNode condition-collapse keeps the shared join (reachable via onTrue survivor), drops only onFalse-exclusive descendants — covered by mutate.test.ts delete suite + a 60-step random insert/delete property loop that runs buildDefinition through the REAL validateCampaignDefinition after every step (never throws cycle/orphan/no-exit). services/campaign-runner/test/node-dsl-and-validation.test.ts (34 tests, +3 convergence-accept cases: empty-arm rejoin, one populated+one empty arm, one-arm-terminates) plus existing cycle/orphan REJECTION tests still present and passing. e2e 'delete the condition of a diamond re-links' (line 348) PASSED — uses styled app-dialog askConfirm + dialog-confirm (NOT window.confirm). Workspace-scoping unchanged: persistence still goes through existing workspace-scoped POST/PUT/GET /campaigns (no new routes, no runner/handler change). Regression e2e: campaign-node-editors(8)+campaign-publish-gate(2)+broadcast-and-campaign(13)+build-segment(10)=32/32 PASSED.

recommendations: Optional: add an explicit UNIT/integration round-trip test for save+reload of a converging diamond at the local-api tier (get-campaign.integration.test.ts) so DSL persistence identity is asserted without relying solely on the e2e (current coverage is e2e round-trip + the pure model.test.ts deep-equal; both pass but a dedicated PG-tier diamond round-trip would harden it).

Optional: armInsertIndices in the e2e selects arm + controls purely by geometry (top>conditionBottom, sorted by left). If a future layout tweak moves the trunk insert below the condition card this heuristic could mis-select; consider a stable per-edge data attribute (e.g. data-slot=onTrue/onFalse) on campaign-edge-insert to make arm selection explicit rather than positional.

Pre-existing (not this phase): the 7 known react-hooks/exhaustive-deps 'rule not found' lint errors in untouched web files should eventually be fixed (the rule plugin is not resolving) so `pnpm lint` can be a clean CI gate; phase files lint clean (eslint exit 0).

_verificationNotes.unitIntegration: DATABASE_URL=postgres://...:5433/cdp pnpm test run TWICE cold: 43/43 task packages pass. Real Postgres confirmed (cdp reachable via pg; local-api 205 integration tests pass against it; @cdp/tests 45 incl. acceptance/penetration-isolation against real DB; NO Postgres mock in campaign-runner tests). web 136 (mutate16/layout13/ortho8/model19/node-config etc), campaign-runner 171 (dsl 34). mutate.test.ts imports the REAL validateCampaignDefinition from @cdp/service-campaign-runner and gates every mutation through it.
_verificationNotes.lint: pnpm lint: only the 7 KNOWN pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps 'rule not found' errors in untouched files (lines 45,69,103,132,146,367,425) — NO new errors. Phase files (mutate.ts, layout.ts, *.test.ts) lint clean: npx eslint on them exited 0.
_verificationNotes.playwrightSolo: SOLO Chromium, ports 8788/5174 freed + playwright/chrome killed before each invocation, ONE invocation at a time. campaign-builder: 11/11 PASSED (28.1s). Regression (campaign-node-editors + campaign-publish-gate + broadcast-and-campaign + build-segment): 32/32 PASSED (1.4m).
_verificationNotes.scopeAndHygiene: Product source changed ONLY in web/src/campaigns/mutate.ts + layout.ts. CampaignCanvas.tsx, orthogonal-path.ts, model.ts source UNCHANGED (only their tests). services/ + packages/ source UNCHANGED (runner untouched — only its test file changed, confirming 'runner unchanged' claim). No migrations. Version 0.34.0 -> 0.35.0 (minor) in package.json. CLAUDE.md updated with a dedicated phase-6b note + the phase-5 note revised to the rejoin behavior. The .a5c/processes/cdp-campaign-builder.js change is babysitter phase-tracking METADATA, not product scope. No native dialogs (delete uses styled askConfirm/app-dialog). Seed divergence assertions were REPLACED with convergence assertions (not deleted) so regression keeps teeth.
_verificationNotes.naApplicability: idempotencyOk/webhookSafetyOk are N/A for this pure client-side graph-math phase (runner + dispatcher + webhook code untouched) -> set true with note; their guarantees are unchanged because no runner/send/webhook source was modified. isolationOk: persistence unchanged via existing workspace-scoped POST/PUT/GET /campaigns; no workspace_id ever client-supplied; pure client-side mutation.
